abilities.name: swift-swim
abilities.effect: This Pokémon's Speed is doubled during rain. This bonus does not count as a stat modifier.
abilities.flavorText: Boosts the Pokémon's Speed stat in rain.

abilities.name: oblivious
abilities.shortEffect: Prevents infatuation and protects against Captivate.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon cannot be infatuated and is immune to Captivate. If a Pokémon is infatuated and acquires this ability, its infatuation is cleared.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon is oblivious, keeping it from being infatuated, falling for taunts, or being affected by Intimidate.

abilities.name: adaptability
abilities.shortEffect: Increases the same-type attack bonus from 1.5× to 2×.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon inflicts twice as much damage with moves whose types match its own, rather than the usual same-type attack bonus of 1.5×.
abilities.flavorText: Powers up moves of the same type as the Pokémon.
